name: Check transcation is present on Order backend

condition.statement:
let element = document.getElementsByClassName('wp-menu-name')

return element.length === 0
return "{{hpos}}" === "off"
return "{{hpos}}" === "on"

let payment = "{{payment}}"
return payment != "ach"

let payment = "{{payment}}"
return payment != "ach"

let payment = "{{payment}}"
return payment != "ach"

let payment = "{{payment}}"
let test = "{{test}}"
return payment === "ach" && test != "ipn"

let payment = "{{payment}}"
let test = "{{test}}"
return payment === "ach" && test != "ipn"

let test = "{{test}}"
let payment ="{{payment}}"
return test != "preorder" && payment != "ach"

let test = "{{test}}"
let payment ="{{payment}}"
return test != "preorder" && payment != "ach"

let pay = "{{pay}}"
return pay === "now"

let pay = "{{pay}}"
return pay === "upfront"

let payment = "{{payment}}"
return payment === "ach"

let payment = "{{payment}}"
let product = "{{product}}"
let status = document.querySelector('#select2-order_status-container').textContent 
return payment === "ach" && product === "simple" && status === 'On hold'

let payment = "{{payment}}"
let product = "{{product}}"
let status = document.querySelector('#select2-order_status-container').textContent 
return payment === "ach" && product === "simple" && status === 'Failed'

let payment = "{{payment}}"
let product = "{{product}}"
let status = document.querySelector('#select2-order_status-container').textContent 
return payment === "ach" && product === "simple" 
        && (status === 'Completed' || status === 'Processing')

let payment = "{{payment}}"
let product = "{{product}}"
let status = document.querySelector("#select2-order_status-container").textContent
return payment === "ach" && product === "subscription" && status === 'On hold'

let payment = "{{payment}}"
let product = "{{product}}"
let status = document.querySelector("#select2-order_status-container").textContent
return payment === "ach" && product === "subscription" && (status === 'Completed' || status === 'Processing')

let payment = "{{payment}}"
let product = "{{product}}"
let status = document.querySelector("#select2-order_status-container").textContent
return payment === "ach" && product === "subscription" && status === 'Failed'
